[[General/Legends|General]] '''Garv Tomas''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] from [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]]. A [[Colonel/Legends|colonel]] and a member of [[Alpha Blue]] under [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Hiram Drayson/Legends|Hiram Drayson]], he was later placed in charge of the [[Imperial Palace/Legends|Imperial Palace]] security by [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]], a position he retained until the [[Battle of Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Coruscant]]. He escaped on the ''[[First Citizen]]''.

==Appearances==
*''[[Tyrant's Test]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Star by Star]]''
